title: BISINDO Translation System
description: Engineered an Indonesian Sign Language translation system featuring two distinct modes: one mode using a camera for a Computer Vision pipeline to extract spatial features with MediaPipe, and a separate mode utilizing physical sensors on gloves to process continuous hand telemetry. Implemented FAISS for 1-NN spatial vector matching.

title: FIRE-SENSE
description: Developing a predictive dashboard for forest fire detection utilizing machine learning, focusing on model feature engineering and SHAP value analysis.

title: Moli-Milo (Full-Stack Web3 RBAC System)
description: Developed a Web3 application with Smart Contract-based Role-Based Access Control on a private Ethereum network. Implemented 5-layer security and built a Go backend for asynchronous blockchain event logging.

title: Student Status Prediction
description: Developed a Multi-class Softmax Regression model from scratch to classify student classes. Engineered a preprocessing pipeline using One-Hot Encoding and ANOVA.

title: Applicant Tracking System
description: Developed a desktop ATS to automate CV screening using exact search algorithms (KMP, Boyer-Moore) and fuzzy matching (Levenshtein Distance).

title: Intelligent Course Scheduler
description: Built an AI-based system to automatically generate weekly class timetables using metaheuristic algorithms like Hill Climbing, Simulated Annealing, and Genetic Algorithm.
